name: Eurofiber AS29396
notes:
Please refer to AS39686 for all new peering requests.

AS29396 has the other Eurofiber group networks behind it available:
- AS39686 Eurofiber, fiberaccess provider in the Benelux
- AS35625 Eurafibre, fiberaccess provider in France
- AS209349 Lumos, fiberaccess provider in France
- AS39405 Fullsave, fiberaccess provider in France
- AS198682 Netiwan, fiberaccess provider in France
- AS25459 Dataplace, group of datacenters in NL
- AS205185 Dcspine, datacenter 2 datacenter network in Europe
- AS200780 Appliwave, fiberaccess provider in France

Small traffic and/or public peering: please peer on RS at AMS-IX, BN-IX or France-IX.
